help.label: Show help
help.restartTourDescription: A short 4-step tutorial that walks you through the main features.

diary.title: What the Health Diary is for
diary.body: Log what happened to your pet and what worked — next time you'll see a proven solution.
diary.example: e.g. “Tick on the back → removed, gave Bravecto, worked.”

passport.title: What the Health Passport is for
passport.body: Keep vaccinations, dewormings, medications and weight in one place and track due dates.
passport.example: e.g. the next rabies booster date and a history of visits.

vetCard.title: What the Vet Card is for
vetCard.body: Print a clear summary with everything the vet needs before each visit.
vetCard.example: e.g. active medications, recent vaccinations and recent issues on one page.

analyze.title: What the Analysis is for
analyze.body: Snap or paste a food's ingredients and AI tells you whether it suits your pet.
analyze.example: e.g. a chicken allergen warning for a dog with a food allergy.

history.title: What the History is for
history.body: All your past food analyses in one place, so you can compare foods and revisit results.
history.example: e.g. compare the scores of two kibbles you're choosing between.

profiles.title: What Pet Profiles are for
profiles.body: Keep each pet's breed, age, allergies and conditions here — analyses and the passport use them.
profiles.example: e.g. add a chicken allergy so food analysis warns you automatically.

welcome.title: Welcome to Pawly
welcome.body: Analyze pet food from a photo or text — AI tells you whether it suits your pet and warns about allergens.

profile.title: Profiles and health passport
profile.body: Create a pet profile, add allergies and keep a health passport — vaccinations, dewormings, medications and weight.

diary.title: Health diary and vet card
diary.body: Log health records and print a clear vet card with everything the vet needs before each visit.

install.title: Install the app
install.body: Add Pawly to your phone or desktop home screen and use it like a native app — even offline. You can find help anytime via the “?” button in the bottom-right.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Today in Pawly
overview.emptySubtitle: Add your pet and Pawly will help you keep its care under control.

checkIn.title: Weekly check-in
checkIn.subtitle: A quick check on how your pet has been this week.
checkIn.selectPet: Which pet do you want to check in?
checkIn.question: How was {{name}} this week?
checkIn.addOptional: Want to add weight or a note?
checkIn.resultNone: Great, {{name}} is doing fine this week.
checkIn.resultMild: We noted a mild change. If it recurs, Pawly will help you create a health episode.
checkIn.resultAttention: Some symptoms may need attention. If they persist or worsen, contact your vet.
checkIn.historyEmpty: No check-ins yet. Fill the first one and Pawly will start tracking the trend.
checkIn.recurringHint: Recurring: {{symptom}}. Consider recording a health episode.

aiDisclaimer: This output is AI-generated and may contain errors. It does not replace professional veterinary advice.

actions.confirmSaveMessage: Are you sure you want to save this record?
actions.confirmDeleteRecordMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this record? The record cannot be restored.

auth.confirmDeleteMessage: Really delete your account? All your pets and health records will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
auth.deleteAccountFailed: Account deletion failed. Please try again.
auth.exportDataFailed: Data download failed. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The URL you entered doesn't exist or has been moved.

aiProgress.slow: This is taking longer than usual. You can keep waiting, or cancel.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a question, found a bug, or want to share feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.responseHint: We usually reply within a few business days.
contact.faqHint: Before writing, check the FAQ — you might find the answer there faster.

support.intro: Pawly is built independently. If you find it useful, you can support its development with a one-time contribution.

donateThanks.title: Thank you for your support!
donateThanks.subtitle: Your contribution helps Pawly grow — new features, better AI quality, and stable hosting.
